text: The Signed PDFs table cell (SignedPdfsTableCell) in the main dashboard table only received summary.signedDocuments and had no awareness of the energy certificate. As a result, even when the EC was completed, no view/download buttons appeared in the table row. Fix: added energyCertificate prop to SignedPdfsTableCell and a new EcPdfTableButtons component that lazily loads the project detail (via loadProjectDetail, same pattern as SignedPdfButtons) and calls buildEnergyCertificatePdfFactory. The empty-state guard was also updated: previously returned '—' when items was empty, but now stays visible if EC is completed.
issue: No EC PDF view/download option in Signed PDFs column of main dashboard table
